mapper.select:
SELECT p.profile_id AS profileId, p.user_id AS userId, p.group_id AS groupId, p.group_role AS groupRole, p.member_name AS memberName, p.member_relation AS memberRelation, p.member_gender AS memberGender, p.member_height AS memberHeight, p.member_weight AS memberWeight, p.member_birthday AS memberBirthday, p.activity_level AS activityLevel, p.target_weight AS targetWeight, p.diet_speed AS dietSpeed, p.bmr_calories AS bmrCalories, p.tdee_calories AS tdeeCalories, p.daily_target_calories AS dailyTargetCalories, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, g.group_name AS groupName FROM diet_user_health_profile p LEFT JOIN diet_family_group g ON p.group_id = g.group_id AND g.del_flag = 0 WHERE p.del_flag = 0
AND p.group_id = #{po.groupId}
AND p.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{po.name}, '%')
ORDER BY p.profile_id DESC
